zh.Newcastle, Northumberland, England, Unit: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne Selby於1434年出生在英國越可爾塞爾比時，她的父親Anthony Selby25歲，母親Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield23歲。她於1452年與Thomas Bennett在英國素可迪恩結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1474年12月19日在英國武斯特斯爾布洛姆斯格洛福享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne Selby于1434年出生在英国越可爾塞爾比时，她的父亲Anthony Selby25岁，母亲Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield23岁。她于1452年与Thomas Bennett在英国素可迪恩结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1474年12月19日在英国武斯特斯爾布洛姆斯格洛福享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Selby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire) and Scottish: habitational name from Selby (Yorkshire). The placename may derive from Old English sele ‘willow copse’, sometimes alternating with salh ‘willow’, + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

variants.name: Shelby
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): probably a variant of   Selby  .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne Selby was born in 1434, in Selby, Yorkshire, England, her father, Anthony Selby, was 25 and her mother, Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield, was 23. She married Thomas Bennett in 1452, in Dean, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 19 December 1474, in Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne Selby est née en 1434, à Selby, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Anthony Selby, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Bennett en 1452, à Dean, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 19 décembre 1474, à Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne Selby 1434 in Selby, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Anthony Selby 25 und ihre Mutter Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield 23. Sie hat 1452 in Dean, Sussex, England Thomas Bennett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 19. Dezember 1474 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, England.

Lei sposato Thomas Bennett nel 1452, nel Dean, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 19 dicembre 1474, nel Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 40 anni.

ko.Newcastle, Northumberland, England, Unit: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Selby(이)가 1434년 영국 요르크실르 셀비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Anthony Selby(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1452년 영국 수세스 디에서 Thomas Bennett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1474년 12월 19일 영국 워스스터실르 브롬스그로브에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Selby nasceu em 1434, em Selby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Anthony Selby, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Bennett em 1452, em Dean, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 19 de dezembro de 1474, em Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos.

ru.Newcastle, Northumberland, England, Unit: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne Selby родилась в 1434 г. в местности селби, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Anthony Selby было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Bennett в 1452 г. в местности дин, суссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 19 декабря 1474 г. в местности бромсгров, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne Selby nació en 1434, en Selby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Anthony Selby, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Thomas Bennett en 1452, en Dean, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 19 de diciembre de 1474, en Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años.
